name: /incident timeline scaffold records the summary and severity fields supplied at invocation per F-5
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/incident.sh" 'cache stampede' --date 2026-05-25 --severity medium 2>/dev/null && grep -q 'summary: cache stampede' incidents/2026-05-25-001/timeline.md && grep -q 'severity: medium' incidents/2026-05-25-001/timeline.md && echo scaffolded 1>&2
